CustomField.description: Is the HCP to be provided with Educational Support by Viatris a government official (per Viatris's Anti-Corruption Policy)? If yes, provide a description of why he/she is considered a government official.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Is the HCP to be provided with Educational Support by Viatris a government official (per Viatris's Anti-Corruption Policy)? If yes, provide a description of why he/she is considered a government official.
CustomField.label: Is Viatris HCP Educational Support
